items.title: Martin Fowler — IntegrationTest
items.note: Definitions of narrow vs broad integration; clarifies the term's ambiguity.

items.title: testcontainers-python
items.note: Spin up real services (Postgres, Redis, Kafka, etc.) in Docker for integration tests.

items.title: pytest-recording (VCR for pytest)
items.note: Records and replays HTTP requests as cassettes via `vcrpy`.

items.title: Pact — Consumer-Driven Contract Testing
items.note: Contract-test tooling popular for microservice integration.

items.title: Mike Bland — Goto Fail, Heartbleed, and Unit Testing Culture
items.note: Long-form essay on why unit-only test cultures miss critical bugs — argues for the integration layer.
